ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "nih_record_id" TEXT /* User ID from the NIH database */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has provided consent */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_use" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance use record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "alcohol_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of alcohol consumption */,
  "alcohol_drinks_per_day" INTEGER /* Average number of drinks per day when consuming alcohol */,
  "tobacco_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant uses tobacco */,
  "illicit_drug_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant uses illicit drugs */,
  "cannabis_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant uses cannabis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_use_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey record */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who completed the survey */,
  "responses" TEXT /* JSON object containing survey responses */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., baseline, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_values" (
  "missing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing value record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "data_element" TEXT /* Element of data that is missing */,
  "missing_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the missing data */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the missing value was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("missing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missing_values_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data element */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the data element */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Associated terms for the data element */,
  "datatype" TEXT /* Data type of the element (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern for data validation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement if applicable */,
  "enumeration" TEXT /* Enumerated options for responses */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data element is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enumerations" (
  "enum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enumeration */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data element */,
  "value" TEXT /* The value of the enumeration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enumeration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data element */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., range, format) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_surveys" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-survey association */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the completed survey */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "dq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution status of the issue */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "changed_column" TEXT /* Column that was changed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_variables" (
  "dv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived variable record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the derived variable */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the derived variable */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the variable was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_variables_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
